namespace MrKWatkins.OakCpu.Z80;
/// <summary>
/// Represents a cycle-accurate Z80 emulator that executes one T-state at a time.
/// </summary>

public sealed unsafe partial class Z80StepEmulator

    /// <summary>
    /// Initializes a new Z80StepEmulator instance.
    /// </summary>
    public Z80StepEmulator()
    {
        opcodeStepTable = OpcodeStepTableNoPrefix;
        Registers = new Z80StepRegisters(this);
        Flags = new Z80StepFlags(this);
        Interrupts = new Z80StepInterrupts(this);
    }

    [FieldOffset(29)]
    private ushort address;

    /// Gets the address for the current external bus action.
    /// </summary>
    public ushort Address

        get => address;

    private ushort currentStep;

    private byte data;

    public byte Data

        get => data;

        set => data = value;
